text.title: AI-Enhanced Design Systems Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 antipatterns observed when applying ai-enhanced-design-systems. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: AI runs on a system with inconsistent naming; produces 200 docs with conflicting prop names.
antipattern.root-cause: Author tried to amplify before stabilising.
antipattern.fix: Stabilise tokens + naming first; then amplify.

antipattern.symptom: Docs say a prop accepts `string` when source says `number`.
antipattern.root-cause: Doc gen used prompt, not source.
antipattern.fix: Generate from source AST + stories only.

antipattern.symptom: 100 variants generated per component; CI takes 4 hours.
antipattern.fix: Cap variants per component; tier by token axes.

antipattern.symptom: Hallucinated a11y claim ships in public docs.
antipattern.fix: Make human review a publish gate.
